evidence: Replaced prior Ultragoal state at user request. Initialized durable ledger for approved markdown heading live-preview behavior after Feature Grill and Ralplan consensus; Critic verdict APPROVE.

Added optional LivePreviewRange.revealPolicy with default-preserving filtering semantics. Primitive tests cover caret-only and never reveal policies; existing focused source reveal default remains covered. Verification: pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts passed; pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts passed.

Updated heading live-preview ranges so '#' alone produces no heading ranges, '# ' activates heading syntax, marker ranges reveal only for collapsed caret, and heading content remains rendered for caret and non-collapsed selection. Verification: pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts passed; pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts passed.

Final quality gate passed after cleanup and review. Verification: pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts passed; pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts passed; pnpm typecheck passed; pnpm lint passed. Code-review recommendation APPROVE with one LOW export ergonomics finding, resolved by re-exporting LivePreviewRevealPolicy. Architect final review CLEAR.

Follow-up correction after screenshot review: heading marker and following spaces now receive the same heading-level styling when revealed for caret editing by adding a non-revealing marker style range alongside the inactive replacement range. Verification: pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts passed; pnpm test tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts passed; pnpm typecheck passed; pnpm lint passed.
